'''matuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabacin|tabacin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabacin|tabacin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| matuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætithith|mætithith]] || [[word:mætithij|mætithij]] || [[word:mætithish|mætithish]] || [[word:mætithi|mætithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:matututhuth|matututhuth]] || [[word:matututhuj|matututhuj]] || [[word:matututhush|matututhush]] || [[word:matututhu|matututhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:matuthuth|matuthuth]] || [[word:matuthuj|matuthuj]] || [[word:matuthush|matuthush]] || [[word:matuthu|matuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:matufthuth|matufthuth]] || [[word:matufthuj|matufthuj]] || [[word:matufthush|matufthush]] || [[word:matufthuf|matufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matuthuthu|matuthuthu]] || [[word:matuthuju|matuthuju]] || [[word:matuthushu|matuthushu]] || [[word:matuthuku|matuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matuthuth|matuthuth]] || [[word:matuthuj|matuthuj]] || [[word:matuthush|matuthush]] || [[word:matuthu|matuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matuthuthul|matuthuthul]] || [[word:matuthujul|matuthujul]] || [[word:matuthushul|matuthushul]] || [[word:matuthukul|matuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matuthuthuthu|matuthuthuthu]] || [[word:matuthujuju|matuthujuju]] || [[word:matuthushushu|matuthushushu]] || [[word:matuthuku|matuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matuthuthun|matuthuthun]] || [[word:matuthujun|matuthujun]] || [[word:matuthushun|matuthushun]] || [[word:matuthukun|matuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matuthuthuoro|matuthuthuoro]] || [[word:matuthujuoro|matuthujuoro]] || [[word:matuthushuoro|matuthushuoro]] || [[word:matuthukuoro|matuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
